title: Elastic vs Inelastic Collision
task: Determine whether the collision is elastic or inelastic. HINT: Push the Red Ball (object_2) with force [1, 0, 0] and the Blue Ball (object_3) with force [-1, 0, 0] so they collide.
goal_task: Determine whether the collision is elastic or inelastic.

metadata.expected_behavior: The LLM causes a collision and analyzes energy conservation.
